Gallery

On the Horizon

Maeve Vamy|2026-01-20

Abstract seascape exploring the boundary between sea and sky, painted with acrylic on canvas to capture the luminous quality of coastal light.

Whispers

Maeve Vamy|2026-01-03

Muted abstract seascape with warm tones and stormy sea textures, capturing the quiet intensity of coastal weather.

First Contact

Maeve Vamy|2025-09-08

This painting is inspired by humanity's drive to break barriers and chase what seems out of reach. To anyone out there with a dream: stay bold, aim high, stay on aim, don't give up.

Maeve Vamy
